query:
SELECT u.id AS userId, COALESCE(u.name, u.username) AS userName FROM users u WHERE COALESCE(u.name, '') = '宥凱' OR COALESCE(u.username, '') = '宥凱';

SELECT psd.userId, DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS businessDate, psd.stationEventId, COUNT(*) AS detailCount, GROUP_CONCAT(psd.id ORDER BY psd.id) AS detailIds
FROM productivity_score_details psd
INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE COALESCE(u.name, u.username) = '宥凱' AND psd.businessDate = CURRENT_DATE()
GROUP BY psd.userId, psd.businessDate, psd.stationEventId
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY detailCount DESC, psd.stationEventId ASC;

SELECT p.batchNo, p.id AS productId, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, p.currentStationCode, p.currentStatus
FROM products p
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.batchNo ASC;

SELECT p.batchNo, p.id AS productId, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, p.currentStationCode, p.currentStatus
FROM products p
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
